response.title: Retail Store Assistant Manager
response.description: The Fashion Hub is seeking a Mid-level Retail Store Assistant Manager to support daily operations, lead a team of sales associates, and enhance our customer experience. The ideal candidate will have a passion for fashion, strong leadership skills, and a proven track record in retail management. This role involves training staff, managing inventory, and ensuring that sales targets are met.

required_skills: Stock replenishment and loss prevention strategies
preferred_skills: Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Retail Management or a related field
